description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular frame. It is equipped with a long, cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, enhancing stealth capabilities. The rifle has a detachable box magazine and a prominent scope mounted on the top rail for precision aiming. The stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped, with a textured grip and a brown accent on the receiver area. The handguard and fore-end are vented for heat dissipation and have rail segments for accessory attachment. Overall, the rifle appears to be constructed primarily from metal and polymer, giving it a durable yet lightweight build suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, scope, suppressor, and detachable magazine, featuring brown receiver accents and vented handguard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the scope, suppressor, brown receiver accent, and the detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the fixed stock and the back of the scope.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the scope, suppressor, brown receiver accent, and the magazine well.
